title: La parmigiana
writer: Ruggero Maccari, Ettore Scola, Stefano Strucchi
actors: Nino Manfredi, Catherine Spaak, Didi Perego
plot: Dora, driven away from her town by malicious gossip following her first love affair, has a series of short-lived adventures until she falls in love with Nino, a small time crook. In Parma, a police officer courts her but she keeps...
